title: DementiaCraft
description: This mod turns minecraft into the catacombs of Solaris! It is very trippy, and more will be coming soon.
body:
This mod will reshape your world based on what you are looking at!

This is an extension of the FractalWorld mod so big that it became its own mod! This uses a custom chunk loader to reshape your world around you, and this mod is dedicated to corrupting your world!

Currently, the only mode is Catacombs of Solaris / Lobotomy, which will take what you are looking at, and replace the rest of the world where you are not looking with the average block on your screen. This is the precursor to completely remaking Oasis AI minecraft in the real game, which will use your screen to build terrain around you.

All commands start with: LobotoCraft

Low quality video showcase!!1!:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TZXMbBfiSEY](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TZXMbBfiSEY)
